Describe the ingredients presented by the man and any accompanying text overlays as they appear.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a man holds a sliced loaf of brown bread with a golden crust; at 10s, he holds a bunch of yellow bananas instead; at 12s, text overlay describes the bananas as very ripe and mashed; at 18s, he gestures with his right palm open while holding the fruit.

question: Describe the man's attire and the kitchen background elements visible during the presentation.
canonical_answer: At 4s, the man wears a grey apron with brown leather straps; at 10s, his black and white checkered shirt is clearly visible; at 16s, a deep green stove with brass knobs appears behind him; at 18s, copper cookware hangs from a brass rail on the wall.
